payload.content: Add an optional `after_year` criterion to the existing reading-list selection flow. `ReadingList.list_books` and `format_books` should accept the criterion and include only books published strictly after the supplied year; when it is omitted, preserve the current behavior and author filtering. Keep the filtering logic in the filters module. Make the smallest focused source-only change, do not edit tests, documentation, packaging, or lockfiles, run `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`, and report exactly what you verified.

arguments.content:
from collections.abc import Iterable

from .filters import filter_after_year, filter_by_author
from .models import Book


def format_books(books: Iterable[Book], *, author: str | None = None, after_year: int | None = None) -> str:
    selected = filter_by_author(books, author)
    selected = filter_after_year(selected, after_year)
    return "\n".join(f"{book.title} — {book.author} ({book.year})" for book in selected)

from collections.abc import Iterable

from .filters import filter_after_year, filter_by_author
from .models import Book


def format_books(books: Iterable[Book], *, author: str | None = None, after_year: int | None = None) -> str:
    selected = filter_by_author(books, author)
    selected = filter_after_year(selected, after_year)
    return "\n".join(f"{book.title} — {book.author} ({book.year})" for book in selected)

from collections.abc import Iterable

    selected = filter_by_author(books, author)
    selected = filter_after_year(selected, after_year)
    return "\n".join(f"{book.title} — {book.author} ({book.year})" for book in selected)
